response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and experience with large-scale systems, but his background lacks deep, sustained focus on C++ and cloud compute platforms. His leadership experience is present but not explicitly tied to cloud or DevOps engineering, and his recent work leans toward TypeScript/Node.js rather than the core technical requirements of the role.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and large-scale infrastructure (e.g., Sociomantic, GISCollective).
Proven leadership in mentoring, workshops, and technical best practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD, refactoring dojos).
Diverse technical background with exposure to multiple languages and platforms, indicating adaptability.
concerns: Only limited recent experience with C++ (last noted in 2015 at National Instruments).
Lacks explicit experience in a technical leadership role for cloud or DevOps engineers.
Most recent roles focus on full-stack development (TypeScript/Node.js) rather than cloud compute platforms or hardware-adjacent systems.
